product: Databricks connector for Power Platform is generally available ​
tagline: June 23, 2026 The Databricks connector for Microsoft Power Platform is now [generally available](/aws/en/release notes/release types).
what_it_does: June 23, 2026 The Databricks connector for Microsoft Power Platform is now [generally available](/aws/en/release notes/release types). See [Databricks and Microsoft Power Platform integration](/aws/en/integrations/msft power platform/).
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
